div.div:
rootfs Assembly (load_cfs.sh)
1. Extract rootfs.cpio.gz
2. Inject cFS build → /usr/cfs_build/
3. Inject Copilot monitor → /root/monitors/
4. Inject Python test scripts → /root/python/
5. Repack → rootfs.cpio.gz_new

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
Build Flow (make prep_cross && make main_syslog_time_cross):
1. wget archive.tar from GitLab pkg registry (prebuilt kernel + rootfs + SDK)
2. Extract & relocate aarch64 cross-SDK
3. runhaskell → generate Copilot C code
4. aarch64-linux-gcc → cross-compile monitor
5. Clone NASA cFS, apply patches (apply_cfs_prebuild_patch.sh)
6. CMake cross-build cFS with ELISA apps (copilot_app, lights_app, switch_app)
7. load_cfs.sh → extract rootfs, inject cFS + monitor + tests, repack cpio
Run (make main_syslog_time_cross_run):
• qemu-system-aarch64 -M virt -cpu cortex-a57 -smp 4 -m 512M
-kernel Image -initrd rootfs.cpio.gz_new
• Linux boots → cFS auto-starts → apps communicate via Software Bus
• Copilot monitors timing requirement (< 500ms light response)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.div:
cFS Use Case Architecture:
[switch_app] →SB Event→ [lights_app] →SB Command→ [Actuator state]
↓ Events ↓ Events
[copilot_app] ← monitors all SB traffic
[main_syslog_time] ← monitors syslog timing
All apps loaded as shared objects (.so) by cFE Executive Services
at boot via cfe_es_startup.scr configuration
